A '''Proton Seeker''' was an explosive projectile weapon that was fired from a pistol. It had homing capabilities, allowing it to follow its designated target.<ref name="SSW" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]''
*''[[Super Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]''
